content.text:
const getters = {
  sidebar: (state) => state.app.sidebar,
  device: (state) => state.app.device,
  token: (state) => state.user.token,
  avatar: (state) => state.user.avatar,
  name: (state) => state.user.name,
}
export default getters

data.content:
• Routes are defined as static in src/router/index.js (no role-based dynamic route generation in this codebase).

    • Key source files

    • src/permission.js — global beforeEach guard (main control)
    • src/store/modules/user.js — Vuex user module (login / getInfo / resetToken)
    • src/utils/auth.js — token storage helper (uses localStore "store" package)
    • src/utils/request.js — axios instance + response interceptor that handles token-expired codes

    If you want, I can provide a step-by-step sequence diagram or reproduce a specific failure scenario (e.g. how a 50014 response is handled end-to-end).
